arts.ttl: Every word Pau Torres said ahead of Aston Villa's clash with Juventus
arts.sum: The fact we could beat them in Champions League was a really good moment for me as a player and it was my first time playing in this competition. Pau Torres spoke to the media at Bodymoor Heath on Tuesday afternoon ahead of Aston Villa's Champions League clash against Juventus this evening.

arts.ttl: “A spark from Koop could turn things around”: Marchisio on Juventus’ Champions League and Scudetto ambitions
arts.sum: Former Juventus midfielder Claudio Marchisio shared his thoughts on the club’s current situation and upcoming Champions League match against Aston Villa. Speaking to Gazzetta dello Sport, Marchisio emphasized the importance of the match despite Juventus facing significant absences. “We’ve had some memorable Champions League nights in England before. I’m thinking of the 2-2 comeback against Chelsea or the victories against Manchester City and Tottenham. Let’s hope for another great performance. With so many important absences, Juventus will need to show personality and the spirit they displayed in Leipzig,” Marchisio stated. arts.sum: On November 19th, we covered claims from Spain which stated Aston Villa manager Unai Emery is ‘fishing’ at CA Osasuna for Flavien Enzo Boyomo. arts.ttl: Aston Villa handed transfer response over three players as clear verdicts sent
arts.sum: Three players have emerged as potential transfer targets for Aston Villa as the Premier League enters mid-season - and Birmingham Live readers have been having their say on two potential Premier League targets and one young star in our comments section . Villa have a track record of taking young players in January and quickly making them Premier League ready.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Aston Villa v Juventus: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Aston Villa prepare to host Juventus in a crucial Champions League encounter, both teams are grappling with significant injury concerns that could shape the outcome of the match. Unai Emery’s Aston Villa side has been hit hard by recent injuries, with Jacob Ramsey sidelined due to a hamstring issue and Amadou Onana out with a foot injury. Boubacar Kamara and Ezri Konsa are also likely to miss the Juventus fixture, leading to the potential inclusion of Ross Barkley and Matty Cash in midfield and defense.
